_meta.name: gadmin-add-user
_meta.description: Add a new user in Google Admin console. Opens the 'Add new user' dialog and fills First name, Last name, Primary email fields.
_meta.verificationNotes: Dialog opens confirmed (click_text 'Add new user' -> ok). Form fields confirmed via perceive (ariaLabel-based). Type steps not yet run end-to-end.
anomalies: Form fields use ariaLabel not name attribute — CSS selectors must use input[aria-label='...'] pattern
Dialog H1 is 'User Information' not 'Add user' — perceive headings show [DIV:'Add new user', H1:'User Information']
abstractTargets MUST include cachedConfidence>=0.85 and resolvedOn or the extension ignores the selector
Primary email field sets both username and @domain — domain is auto-appended from org config
Google Admin uses /ac/ prefix for all paths

params.primary_email: REQUIRED — username only (without @domain), or full email if domain differs

chain.note: Hard-coded. Do not use relative URLs.
Opens the Add new user slide-out panel. Confirmed working.
Wait for dialog animation and field render.
Click the submit button inside the dialog. WARNING: Same text as the trigger button — may need 'exact' matching or a click on 'target' if click_text picks the wrong one. Monitor behavior.
Confirm user was added. Look for success toast or user row in table.

gadmin-first-name.description: First name input in Add new user dialog
gadmin-first-name.resolveHint: ariaLabel field confirmed via perceive: {'ariaLabel': 'First name *', 'tag': 'INPUT', 'type': 'text'}

gadmin-last-name.description: Last name input in Add new user dialog
gadmin-last-name.resolveHint: ariaLabel field confirmed via perceive: {'ariaLabel': 'Last name *', 'tag': 'INPUT', 'type': 'text'}

gadmin-primary-email.description: Primary email input in Add new user dialog
gadmin-primary-email.resolveHint: ariaLabel field confirmed via perceive: {'ariaLabel': 'Primary email *', 'tag': 'INPUT', 'type': 'text'}

user-created-or-error.description: Either success toast shown, or validation error displayed
